SecretKey.doc: represents a BLS12-381 secret key used for signing messages.

from_seed.doc: derives a secret key from a seed (typically from a mnemonic).

from_bytes.doc: creates a secret key from its 32-byte representation.

to_bytes.doc: returns the 32-byte representation of the secret key.

sign.doc: signs a message and returns the BLS signature.

derive_unhardened.doc: derives an unhardened child key at the given index.

derive_hardened.doc: derives a hardened child key at the given index.

PublicKey.doc: represents a BLS12-381 public key used for verifying signatures.

infinity.doc: creates the identity (point at infinity) public key.

aggregate.doc: aggregates multiple public keys into one.

aggregate_verify.doc: verifies an aggregate signature against multiple public keys and messages.

from_bytes.doc: creates a public key from its 48-byte representation.

to_bytes.doc: returns the 48-byte representation of the public key.

verify.doc: verifies a signature against a message using this public key.

fingerprint.doc: returns the 4-byte fingerprint of the public key.

is_infinity.doc: returns whether this is the identity (point at infinity) key.

is_valid.doc: returns whether this public key is a valid point on the BLS12-381 curve.

infinity.doc: creates the identity (point at infinity) signature.

from_bytes.doc: creates a signature from its 96-byte representation.

to_bytes.doc: returns the 96-byte representation of the signature.

is_infinity.doc: returns whether this is the identity (point at infinity) signature.

is_valid.doc: returns whether this signature is a valid point on the BLS12-381 curve.
